evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: Moku is a fast, minimal manga reader frontend for [Suwayomi-Server](https://github.com/Suwayomi/Suwayomi-Server). It wraps Suwayomi's GraphQL API in a lightweight Tauri app — no Electron overhead.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: View all screenshots →

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: - **Library management** — organize manga into folders, track unread counts, filter by genre - **Built-in reader** — single page, long strip, configurable fit modes, customizable keybinds - **Extension support** — install and manage Suwayomi extensions directly from the app - **Download management** — queue and monitor chapter downloads with progress toasts - **Tracker integration** — sync reading progress with AniList, MyAnimeList, Kitsu, and more - **Auto-start server** — optionally launch Suwayomi in the background on startup - **Multiple themes** — Dark, Light, Midnight, Warm, High Contrast, and more - **Auto-updates** — in-app update checker with silent background notifications

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: Download the latest `moku.flatpak` from the [releases page](https://github.com/Youwes09/Moku/releases/latest).

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: Download the `.exe` installer from the [releases page](https://github.com/Youwes09/Moku/releases/latest). Suwayomi-Server and a JRE are bundled.

evidence.title: v0.6.0
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.6.0 > WARNING: Moku 0.6.0 is currently NOT working on Windows & Mac due to an oversight on my part. I will work on releasing 0.6.1 soon, but for users on those platforms, please go to 0.5.1. ## What's New ### Discord Rich Presence (#16) Moku now integrates with Discord to show what you're reading in your status. When the reader is open it displays the manga title and current chapter with an elapsed timer. When browsing it shows a clean idle state. Toggle it on or off in **Settings → General**. Buttons link to the GitHub repo and Discord server. ### Per-Folder Sorting & Filtering (#13) Each library folder can now be sorted and filtered independently. Sorting options include unread chapters, total chapters, A–Z, recently added, recently read, latest fetched chapter, and latest uploaded chapter. Filtering by publication status is also supported — Ongoing, Completed, Cancelled, Hiatus, and Unknown. ### Improved NSFW Filtering The NSFW genre parser has been expanded to catch a wider range of adult content tags, giving the **Hide NSFW** setting better coverage across sources. ## Bug Fixes - Fixed next chapter navigation loading the previous chapter instead of the next (#16) - …

evidence.title: v0.5.1
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.5.1 ## What's New ### Suwayomi Category Sync (#10) Folders in the library are now powered by your Suwayomi categories directly — no more managing two separate systems. Your existing server-side categories show up as tabs in the library automatically. ### Multi-Select Library Management Manga can now be mass-moved between folders using a new multi-select mode. `Ctrl/Cmd+click` any manga to enter selection mode, then click to add more — a toolbar appears with options to move the selection to a folder or remove from library. Long-press also works on touch devices. `Esc` to cancel, `Ctrl/Cmd+A` to select all. ### Movable Folder Tabs Library folder tabs can now be reordered by dragging them into any position. ## Bug Fixes - Fixed RTL reading mode — right arrow no longer skips an entire chapter (#12) - Fixed next chapter navigation loading the previous chapter instead (#11) - Fixed installation server not being killed correctly on exit, leading to overwrite errors on reinstall - Fixed splash screen not respecting the configured default on first launch ## Notes - Manga card drag & drop has been removed in favor of multi-select, which is more reliable across platforms (especiall…

evidence.title: v0.5.0
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.5.0 ## What's New in 0.5.0 ### Theme Editor Building on the existing theme system, users can now create, import, and export their own custom themes — share your setup with the community or keep a personal collection across installs. ### Security Tab A new **Security** section in Settings consolidates all auth and privacy features: - **Server Authentication** — Basic auth support for password-protected Suwayomi instances, fixing remote server URL connectivity for secured setups - **App Lock** — Lock Moku behind a local authentication prompt to keep your library private - **Socks5 Proxy** *(experimental)* — Route Suwayomi traffic through a Socks5 proxy - **Cloudflare Solver** *(experimental)* — Built-in solver to bypass Cloudflare-protected sources ### Immersive Reader Bars Added an overlay bar mode so that the space occupied by the normal bar can be minimized. ### macOS Support macOS builds are now fully supported and tested. The issues present in v0.4.0 have been patched — macOS is now a first-class target alongside Linux and Windows. ## Bug Fixes - Fixed chapter order not displaying correctly in Series Detail — added a dedicated chapter sorting method (#9) - Fixed remot…
